'''nayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mucously|mucously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mucously|mucously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nayate|nayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nayatesher|nayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nayatesherĂ«m|nayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nayatero|nayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nayateshĂ«|nayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nayateshĂ«m|nayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinayatero|gokinayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinayateshĂ«|gokinayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinayateshĂ«m|gokinayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonayankerom|gonayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonayankeshĂ«|gonayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonayankeshĂ«m|gonayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonayankeya|gonayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nayaterom|nayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nayatemu|nayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nayateya|nayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinayaterom|gokinayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinayatemu|gokinayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinayateya|gokinayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nayayate|nayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nayayatesher|nayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nayayatesherĂ«m|nayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nayayatero|nayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nayayateshĂ«|nayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nayayateshĂ«m|nayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinayayatero|gokinayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinayayateshĂ«|gokinayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinayayateshĂ«m|gokinayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonayayankerom|gonayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonayayankeshĂ«|gonayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonayayankeshĂ«m|gonayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonayayankeya|gonayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nayayaterom|nayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nayayatemu|nayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nayayateya|nayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinayayaterom|gokinayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinayayatemu|gokinayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinayayateya|gokinayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠte|nĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠtesher|nĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠtero|nĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠyĂŠtero|gokinĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠterom|nĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠtemu|nĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠteya|nĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠyĂŠterom|gokinĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠyĂŠteya|gokinĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafyafte|nafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafyaftesher|nafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafyaftesherĂ«m|nafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafyaftero|nafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafyafteshĂ«|nafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafyafteshĂ«m|nafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafyaftero|gokinafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafyafteshĂ«|gokinafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafyafteshĂ«m|gokinafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafyafnkerom|gonafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafyafnkeshĂ«|gonafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafyafnkeshĂ«m|gonafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafyafnkeya|gonafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafyafterom|nafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafyaftemu|nafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafyafteya|nafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafyafterom|gokinafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafyaftemu|gokinafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafyafteya|gokinafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
